user_bio: Sven Flätchen, Dipl.-Kaufmann, child of the 80s, hobby cook and proud dad #smartdad with a passion for old motorcycles. Because "Fulltime Multitasking Marketing Ninja" is not an official job title, he carries the title Head of Marketing with us. With his creativity and variety of ideas, our man from the Saarland is a real team player and responsible for the international marketing of our project management solution smenso.
